calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Bob Balian, CSR #5220.

Kurtiss A. Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express, FSB.
No appearance by defendant Jerrilyn Wong.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on September 2, 2009.
Declaration of Joshua Knurr in Lieu of Personal Testimony at Trial (CCP Section 98) was filed November 30, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express, FSB, and against defendant Jerrilyn Wong as follows:

Principal - $24,376.34.
Interest - $6,566.34.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $385.00.

Total - $31,327.68.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Set For Trial On Dec-14-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
